description: This file controls the functionalities of shrine objects found in area levels. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Code
columns.description: Code function used to define the Shrine's function. Uses ID values to define what function to use.

columns.name: Arg0
columns.description: Integer value used as a possible parameter for the .Code function

columns.name: Arg1
columns.description: Integer value used as a possible parameter for the .Code function

columns.name: Duration in frames
columns.description: Duration of the effects of the Shrine (Calculated in Frames, where 25 Frames = 1 Second)

columns.name: reset time in minutes
columns.description: Controls the amount of time before the Shrine is available to use again. Each value of 1 equals 1200 Frames or 48 seconds. A value of 0 means that the Shrine is a one-time use.

columns.name: StringName
columns.description: Uses a string to display as the Shrine's name

columns.name: StringPhrase
columns.description: Uses a string to display as the Shrine's activation phrase when it is used

columns.name: effectclass
columns.description: Used to define the Shrine's archetype which is involved with calculating region stats

columns.name: LevelMin
columns.description: Define the earliest area level where the Shrine can spawn. Corresponds to an index for an area level from levels
